decision.value: Reject invalid Stripe signatures before PostgreSQL persistence
decision.evidence: reject a bad Stripe signature before the payload reaches Postgres

tradeoff.value: Rejected events are not replayable to avoid storing unauthenticated data
tradeoff.evidence: rejected events are not replayable, but storing unauthenticated data is worse

architecture_change.value: Verify Stripe signatures at the edge

open_question.value: Whether metrics include the endpoint ID
